query: soft focus dreamy out of focus defocused portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: soft focus dreamy defocused portraits

response.objective_caption: A person with light skin and reddish-brown hair partially visible against a warm background of pink and peach tones, with one eye clearly visible looking directly at the viewer. The subject is framed from the shoulders up with soft, warm lighting creating a gradient from pink at the top to golden yellow at the bottom of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, dreamlike portrait of a person with light skin and reddish-brown hair, where the face dissolves into soft focus leaving only one eye sharply visible and staring intensely at the viewer. The image features extreme soft-focus effects that erase most facial details, with blown-out overexposure in the lower portion creating a pale golden wash. The top of the head and hair are cropped by the frame edge while one eye pierces through the haze, creating an unsettling contrast between clarity and dissolution, with a sickly warm pink-to-peach color cast pervading the entire image.
